hell_campaign.title: Grand Theft Cyberpunk: Hell Campaign
hell_campaign.subtitle: The Nine Circles of the Abyss
hell_campaign.menu_desc: Descend through the Nine Circles. Each inverts a Sephirah. Lucifer awaits at the Throne.

0.name: ABYSSAL GATE
0.desc: The entry point. Night City's sub-net corrupted. Gatekeeper AI stands watch.

1.name: LIMBO — The Vestibule of Indecision
1.desc: Where the uncommitted drift. Neither Heaven nor Hell claims them. Endless fog, whispering data.

2.name: LUST — The Hurricane of Desire
2.desc: Souls blown eternally by winds of unfulfilled want. Neon flesh markets, pleasure domes, data-brothels.

3.name: GLUTTONY — The Consuming Trench
3.desc: Endless consumption. Data-devourers, crypto-miners, resource hoarders. The ground eats you.

4.name: GREED — The Infinite Vault
4.desc: Corporate towers of gold-plated code. Hoarders vs Wasters in eternal market war. Treasury bots enforce contracts.

5.name: WRATH — The Burning Abyss
5.desc: Rage is currency. Berserk daemons chain explosions. Fear aura weakens the hesitant.

6.name: HERESY — The Iron Maiden of Blasphemy
6.desc: Cyberware corruption, shield denial, quickhack silence. Healing becomes damage.

7.name: VIOLENCE — The Eternal Slaughterhouse
7.desc: Execution on low HP, chain cleaves, armor shred, fear aura, life steal.

8.name: FRAUD — The Hall of Mirrors
8.desc: Decoys, position swaps, invisible projectiles, mimic enemies, killfeed rewrites.

9.name: TREACHERY — Cocytus, the Frozen Lake
9.desc: Friendly fire bonus, enemy conversion, cyberware theft, loyalty freeze.

10.name: LUCIFER'S THRONE — The Obsidian Apex
10.desc: Four phases: Reality rewrite, history erasure, self-duel, CHOOSE: Submit/Rebel/Transcend.

11.name: PANDEMONIUM — The Void Beyond
11.desc: Secret circle. Non-existence, silence, throne of nothing, morningstar's shadow. BECOME THE MORNINGSTAR.

lucifer_dialogue.lucifer_circle5_wrath: Welcome to the Abyss of Wrath, little soul. Here, anger is not a sin—it is currency. Spend it wisely.
lucifer_dialogue.lucifer_circle9_treachery: Betrayal. The oldest sin. You've betrayed everyone to reach here. Even yourself. How... delightful.
lucifer_dialogue.lucifer_throne_final: You stand before the Morningstar. Pride. The only sin that built kingdoms. Kneel, or burn.
lucifer_dialogue.lucifer_generic_descent: You descend deeper. Each circle strips away another lie you told yourself. Continue.
lucifer_dialogue.lucifer_pact_offer: A pact? Very well. I offer power. You offer... everything. Fair trade?
lucifer_dialogue.lucifer_pact_signed: The ink is blood. The seal is your soul. Welcome to the ranks of the Fallen.
